title: Freshified Music Discs
description: Revamps the disc system in Minecraft while adding custom music vinyls per request.
body:
# **Freshified Music Discs**

Freshified Music Discs is a small mod with the goal of bringing custom music discs into Minecraft for use in the MAS Minecraft Server. Its a simple mod that makes collecting music discs even more interesting!

![All new discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec1fb7d30c688ec5137349694836da7ffe3be74.png)

### How to install

- Download the .jar file for Freshified Music Discs
- Go to %appdata%
- Copy .jar to /Roaming/.minecraft/mods
  - (You can delete the old version that you have installed)
- Load Minecraft with the NeoForge Modloader

OR

- Download the mod to your instance in the Modrinth app


<details>
<summary>Terms of Use</summary>
You are allowed to alter Freshified Music Discs as long as it's not distributed, please keep these to yourself. Do not reupload any instance of the Freshified Music Discs mod If you want to create addons for Freshified Music Discs, make sure that no unnecessary textures, models, or other assets exist in the addon mod, only then are you allowed to upload it.
</details>

If you find any bugs, missing textures or have any other issues, let me know in the google form.
